_comment: TEMPORARY platform-side stand-in for a per-stack AgentStack claim. TARGET (FU-045/FU-048, docs/agents/platform-and-stacks.md): each stack's -iac repo OWNS this as a Crossplane `AgentStack` claim (its repos + model tiers + tools + git workflow + review rubric = the stack's POLICY); homelab publishes the XRD/Composition that renders the coordinator gate/CronJob + review-reflex + RBAC (the MECHANISM). Kept claim-shaped so the migration is a lift, not a rewrite — coordinator-scan.sh reads this via one swap-point function that later becomes `kubectl get agentstacks`.
